testcases.input: millis = 100 Output: 100 Explanation: It should return a promise that resolves after 100ms. let t = Date.now(); sleep(100).then(() => { console.log(Date.now() - t); // 100 });
testcases.expectedOutput: 100 Explanation: It should return a promise that resolves after 100ms. let t = Date.now(); sleep(100).then(() => { console.log(Date.now() - t); // 100 });
